# DevFlow Technology
> Premier software engineering studio & AI agency based in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India. Specializing in custom web systems, AI automation, enterprise ERP, SaaS platforms, and GEO/AEO search optimization.

DevFlow Technology is an engineering-first IT agency designing custom software systems, scalable databases, high-frequency crawlers, and AI-driven automation. Founded by Prince Gajjar (CEO) and Bhavin Rajput (CTO). We serve clients across India, the USA, Germany, and Europe.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://devflow.co.in/): Overview of DevFlow's capabilities and featured projects
- [About](https://devflow.co.in/about): Company philosophy, values, and founders
- [Services](https://devflow.co.in/services): AI automation, web development, UI/UX design, cloud hosting
- [Work](https://devflow.co.in/work): Portfolio of 21+ custom-built projects
- [Blog](https://devflow.co.in/blog): Industry insights and technical guides
- [FAQ](https://devflow.co.in/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://devflow.co.in/contact): Get in touch with the founders
- [Expertise](https://devflow.co.in/expertise): Technical skills and technology stack
- [SEO Audit Tool](https://devflow.co.in/seo-audit): Free technical SEO analysis tool

## Services
- [AI Automation & Web Crawlers](https://devflow.co.in/services/ai-automation): Custom LLM models, RAG implementations, Puppeteer scrapers
- [Custom Software & ERP Systems](https://devflow.co.in/services/custom-software-erp): Real-time inventory, fleet logistics, CRM dashboards
- [Enterprise SEO & GEO/AEO](https://devflow.co.in/services/enterprise-seo): AI search engine optimization, JSON-LD schemas
- [SaaS Product Development](https://devflow.co.in/services/saas-development): Multi-tenant platforms, Stripe billing, cloud architecture

## Key Projects
- [Medicare AI System](https://devflow.co.in/work/medicare-ai-system): AI-driven hospital booking and operations dashboard
- [AI Resume Parser](https://devflow.co.in/work/ai-resume-parser-saas): Gemini 1.5 Pro powered candidate matching
- [Apex CRM System](https://devflow.co.in/work/apex-crm-system): Enterprise-grade Go + Next.js fleet CRM
- [SaaS Billing Engine](https://devflow.co.in/work/saas-billing-engine): Stripe webhook subscription management
- [Smart Parking IoT System](https://devflow.co.in/work/smart-parking-iot-system): MQTT-connected IoT parking sensors
- [Core Audit Engine](https://devflow.co.in/work/core-audit-engine): Automated Puppeteer SEO crawler
